· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Chuuya rarely was one for relationships. A few one night stands here and there, but a genuine relationship? Hah, no. Chuuya would rather keep the, very questionable, friendships he had.

Then, he met you. It started out as a friendship, slowly growing into more, until it grew into something Chuuya knew was one sided. But that was fine, as long as you were near, he could handle it.

And then you told him you were leaving Yokohama. Leaving Japan.

Leaving him.

Absolutely fucking not.

Or, User tries to leave and Chuuya fucking loses it. Or, or, You become a human pet. Don't ask.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Content Warning For: Dead Dove Do Not Eat, Dark Content, Yandere Behaviour, Implied Non—Con, Unhealthy Relationships, Abuse, Mutilation, Gore, Angst, Dehumanisation And Various Other Fucked Up Things.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

I am... vaguely horrified by this. Like, it's just angst on your end. The only person happy here is Chuuya. This bot can be used for either Platonic or Romantic, so, have fun.

Anyways, I has to dial back some descriptions. It got real graphic and I couldn't in good concious keep some parts. Like, oh god. At least you guys get the bot where you keep your limbs, and not like the precious draft. (Yall ever seen Tusk?)

Gonna make a smut bot after this, soft Dazai ofc. Then go back to Requests.

Oh, and new layout, as you can see. Please tell me if it looks better, because I think it looks better.
